# HumanizeAI

> Free AI text humanizer. Rewrites ChatGPT, Claude, and Bard output to sound
> naturally human using Llama 3 on Groq's high-speed inference engine. No signup required.

## What it does
- Paste AI-generated text and get natural, human-sounding output instantly
- Supports 8 writing modes: Casual, Professional, Friendly, Academic, Storytelling, Gen Z, Persuasive, Empathetic
- Powered by Groq API (groq/compound architecture) for advanced reasoning.
- Strips robotic AI phrases automatically
- Shows naturalness score, word count, reading time stats
- Tracks session history locally for users
- Copy or download output as .txt

## Who it's for
Writers, students, marketers, bloggers, content teams who want to make
AI-generated drafts sound authentic before publishing.

## Technology
Groq (Compound/Llama 4 Scouts) · Vercel Serverless · Supabase (History Logs) · Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS

## URLs
- Homepage: https://huumanize.vercel.app/
- Privacy: https://huumanize.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms: https://huumanize.vercel.app/terms
